claim: Spec-driven development: write detailed spec before code, reducing iteration; AI fills in implementation based on clear requirements
actionable: Write comprehensive spec (requirements, interface, examples) before asking AI to code; this reduces iteration cycles
source_title: Spec-Driven Development: AI Assisted Coding Explained

claim: Include test cases in spec as acceptance criteria; AI generates code to pass tests without separate validation step
actionable: Add test examples to your spec; AI knows success criteria and generates code that passes them
source_title: Spec-Driven Development: AI Assisted Coding Explained
